headline: Chipotle Has a ‘Recipe for Growth.’ Wall Street Is Optimistic.
summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill  struggling with declining same-restaurant sales, needs to convince consumers that its burritos and bowls are still worth the price.  Investors will learn more from the company’s earnings report on Wednesday.  Much of Chipotle’s recent growth has been driven by new restaurant openings.

headline: CHIPOTLE TO GIVE AWAY UP TO $2 MILLION IN FREE BURRITOS TO TEACHERS AND HEALTHCARE WORKERS
summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE: CMG) announced today that it will award up to 200,000 teachers and healthcare workers with free entrée e-gift cards, totaling as much as $2 million in free Chipotle, as part of its annual Teacher Appreciation Week and National Nurses Week celebration. Last year, the program received its highest participation to date, reinforcing the impact of Chipotle's community recognition programs. headline: VIX Climbs as Fed Decision and Mega-Cap Earnings Keep Investors on Edge
summary: The CBOE Volatility Index (^VIX) is hovering near 18 on Wednesday morning, up roughly 1% as traders position ahead of the Federal Reserve’s afternoon policy decision and mega-cap technology earnings. headline: Chipotle stock gets boost from unexpected Q1 sales growth
summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG) stock is getting a boost in Wednesday's extended hours after the fast-casual restaurant's first quarter results came in line with earnings estimates ($0.24 per share) while eking past revenue expectations ($3.09 billion vs. forecasts of $3.07 billion). Yahoo Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma comes on Asking for a Trend to examine Chipotle's same-store sales trends and slightly better-than-expected performance this past quarter.

content.title: Chipotle stock gets boost from unexpected Q1 sales growth

Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG) stock is getting a boost in Wednesday's extended hours after the fast-casual restaurant's first quarter results came in line with earnings estimates ($0.24 per share) while eking past revenue expectations ($3.09 billion vs. forecasts of $3.07 billion).

Yahoo Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma comes on Asking for a Trend to examine Chipotle's same-store sales trends and slightly better-than-expected performance this past quarter.

headline: Chipotle (NYSE:CMG) Beats Q1 CY2026 Sales Expectations, Stock Soars
summary: Mexican fast-food chain Chipotle (NYSE:CMG) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 7.4% year on year to $3.09 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.24 per share was in line with analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Chipotle (CMG) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: Scott Boatwright: Thank you, Cindy, and good afternoon, everyone.  Before we share our first quarter results, I want to begin by recognizing the extraordinary people who bring our purpose to life every day in our restaurants.  Last month, we held our all Managers' Conference, bringing together nearly 5,000 restaurant and support center leaders.

Before we share our first quarter results, I want to begin by recognizing the extraordinary people who bring our purpose to life every day in our restaurants.  Last month, we held our all Managers' Conference, bringing together nearly 5,000 restaurant and support center leaders.

headline: Chipotle Stock Jumps on Sales Beat. The ‘Recipe for Growth’ Is Looking Good.
summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill  shares jumped Wednesday in after-hours trading after the burrito chain posted quarterly revenue that exceeded analysts’ expectations.  For the three months ending in March, Chipotle grew net revenue by 7.4%, to $3.1 billion, beating analyst expectations of $3.07 billion.  Adjusted earnings came in at 24 cents per share, a 17.2% decrease from the year-ago quarter, in line with expectations.

content.title: Chipotle Stock Jumps on Sales Beat. The ‘Recipe for Growth’ Is Looking Good.
content.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill  shares jumped Wednesday in after-hours trading after the burrito chain posted quarterly revenue that exceeded analysts’ expectations.  For the three months ending in March, Chipotle grew net revenue by 7.4%, to $3.1 billion, beating analyst expectations of $3.07 billion.  Adjusted earnings came in at 24 cents per share, a 17.2% decrease from the year-ago quarter, in line with expectations.

headline: Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG) Q1 Earnings Meet Estimates
summary: Chipotle (CMG) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -1.11% and +0.41%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
